## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.60

### Camera WebRTC
- Normalizes camera SDP answers so audio/video sections answer Home Assistant receive-only offers with send-only media.
- Keeps the data channel section unchanged while still fixing invalid answer setup attributes.
- Keeps the native Home Assistant WebRTC audio/video path active without AlexxIT/WebRTC, go2rtc, aiortc, or transcoding.

### XS01-WX Test Button
- Updates the standalone XS01-WX test-button payload to match the APK v2 self-test path.
- Sends the standalone XS01-WX test command through the 2nd self-test shadow with the same source and timestamp fields used by the app.

### Debug Logging
- Keeps compact SDP normalization counts in the WebRTC debug context.
- Keeps SDP, ICE candidates, ticket signatures, tokens, and full serial numbers out of debug logs.
